items.summary_en: Changelog Keep track of latest changes on the Hugging Face Hub Apr 17, 26 Upvote 131 +126 Apr 17, 26 Spaces agents.md for your coding agents Upvote 131 +126 Every Gradio Space now auto-serves an /agents.md endpoint, a machine-readable API description that AI agents can read and call directly. Point your coding agent...
items.evidence_excerpt: Changelog Keep track of latest changes on the Hugging Face Hub Apr 17, 26 Upvote 131 +126 Apr 17, 26 Spaces agents.md for your coding agents Upvote 131 +126 Every Gradio Space now auto-serves an /agents.md endpoint, a machine-readable API description that AI agents can read and call directly. Point your coding agents (like Claude Code, Codex, or Pi) at it and they figure out how to use the Space without any setup. Read the documentation to learn more. Apr 15, 26 Upvote 147 +142 Apr 15, 26 Introducing Kernels Upvote 147 +142 Kernels repositories provide an easy way to use kernels: precompiled, optimized for your exact hardware and PyTorch version, ready for torch.compile, and yields 1.7–2.5× speed-ups over baseline PyTorch. You can now browse and load Kernels from the Kernels Hub . Apr 1...
diff_excerpt: -Changelog Keep track of latest changes on the Hugging Face Hub Apr 17, 26 Upvote 130 +125 Apr 17, 26 Spaces agents.md for your coding agents Upvote 130 +125 Every Gradio Space now auto-serves an /agents.md endpoint, a machine-readable API description that AI agents can read and call directly. Point your coding agents (like Claude Code, Codex, or Pi) at it and they figure out how to use the Space without any setup. Read the documentation to learn more. Apr 15, 26 Upvote 147 +142 Apr 15, 26 Introducing Kernels Upvote 147 +142 Kernels repositories provide an easy way to use kernels: precompiled, optimized for your exact hardware and PyTorch version, ready for torch.compile, and yields 1.7–2.5× speed-ups over baseline PyTorch. You can now browse and load Kernels from the Kernels Hub . Apr 10, 26 Upvote 128 +123 Apr 10, 26 ZeroGPU overquota Upvote 128 +123 PRO users can now continue using ZeroGPU Spaces above their daily included quota. Over-quota usage requires purchasing pre-paid credits. The price is $1 per 10 minutes of over-quota ZeroGPU usage. Apr 7, 26 Upvote 114 +109 Apr 7, 26 Agent Traces on the Hub Upvote 114 +109 You can now upload traces from your agents ( Claude Code , Codex , Pi ) directly to Hugging Face Datasets. The Hub auto-detects trace formats and tags your dataset as Traces , with a dedicated viewer for browsing sessions, turns, tool calls, and model responses. No preprocessing needed, just upload the JSONL files from your local session directories as-is: Agent Local session directory Claude Code ~/.claude/projects Codex ~/.codex/sessions Pi ~/.pi/agent/sessions Useful for sharing debugging workflows, benchmarking agent behavior across models, or building training data from real coding sessions. Mar 31, 26 Upvote 127 +122 Mar 31, 26 Storage Buckets for Spaces Upvote 127 +122 You can now mount HF Buckets as persistent storage volumes directly in your Spaces . In Space settings, the new "Storage Buckets" section lets you create or select a bucket, set the mount path and access mode. You can also attach a bucket when creating a new Space. Useful for caching model weights, storing user uploads, or sharing files between Spaces under the same organization. Previous 1 2 3 ... 10 Next

+Changelog Keep track of latest changes on the Hugging Face Hub Apr 17, 26 Upvote 131 +126 Apr 17, 26 Spaces agents.md for your coding agents Upvote 131 +126 Every Gradio Space now auto-serves an /agents.md endpoint, a machine-readable API description that AI agents can read and call directly. Point your coding agents (like Claude Code, Codex, or Pi) at it and they figure out how to use the Space without any setup. Read the documentation to learn more. Apr 15, 26 Upvote 147 +142 Apr 15, 26 Introducing Kernels Upvote 147 +142 Kernels repositories provide an easy way to use kernels: precompiled, optimized for your exact hardware and PyTorch version, ready for torch.compile, and yields 1.7–2.5× speed-ups over baseline PyTorch. You can now browse and load Kernels from the Kernels Hub . Apr 10, 26 Upvote 128 +123 Apr 10, 26 ZeroGPU overquota Upvote 128 +123 PRO users can now continue using ZeroGPU Spaces above their daily included quota. Over-quota usage requires purchasing pre-paid credits. The price is $1 per 10 minutes of over-quota ZeroGPU usage. Apr 7, 26 Upvote 114 +109 Apr 7, 26 Agent Traces on the Hub Upvote 114 +109 You can now upload traces from your agents ( Claude Code , Codex , Pi ) directly to Hugging Face Datasets. The Hub auto-detects trace formats and tags your dataset as Traces , with a dedicated viewer for browsing sessions, turns, tool calls, and model responses. No preprocessing needed, just upload the JSONL files from your local session directories as-is: Agent Local session directory Claude Code ~/.claude/projects Codex ~/.codex/sessions Pi ~/.pi/agent/sessions Useful for sharing debugging workflows, benchmarking agent behavior across models, or building training data from real coding sessions. Mar 31, 26 Upvote 127 +122 Mar 31, 26 Storage Buckets for Spaces Upvote 127 +122 You can now mount HF Buckets as persistent storage volumes directly in your Spaces . In Space settings, the new "Storage Buckets" section lets you create or select a bucket, set the mount path and access mode. You can also attach a bucket when creating a new Space. Useful for caching model weights, storing user uploads, or sharing files between Spaces under the same organization. Previous 1 2 3 ... 10 Next
